# Thamama Group

**Summary**: A Lower Cretaceous carbonate group in the Arabian Peninsula.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] characterized the thamama--group to establish a unified nomenclature.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] marine carbonate shelf and ramp

## Diagenetic History

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] not stated in source

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Thamama Group is divided into Sulaiy, Yamama, Buwaib, and Shu'aiba formations. ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992, p. 45]])
